name: cinlink
description: Use CinLink media tools through the standalone CLI.

tools.name: cinlink_configure
tools.description: Store a CinLink API key for later hosted tool calls.

tools.name: cinlink_doctor
tools.description: Check hosted runtime health and local dependency status before local-only tasks.

tools.name: cinlink_setup_local_deps
tools.description: Prompt for or install CinLink local dependencies such as ffmpeg and optional Demucs/soundfile.

tools.name: cinlink_agent_run
tools.description: Submit a natural-language media task to the CinLink hosted agent.

tools.name: cinlink_transcribe
tools.description: Transcribe a local media file into subtitles.

tools.name: cinlink_add_subtitles
tools.description: App-parity workflow: transcribe or translate subtitles, then burn them into a local video.

tools.name: cinlink_dub
tools.description: Generate dubbed speech/audio from a video and subtitle file.

tools.name: cinlink_burn
tools.description: Burn styled subtitles and optional watermarks into a local video with ffmpeg.

tools.name: cinlink_mix_dubbed_audio
tools.description: Mix dubbed audio with the original local video audio.

tools.name: cinlink_summarize
tools.description: Summarize a local video or subtitle file.

tools.name: cinlink_shorten
tools.description: Create a highlight plan for a local video.

tools.name: cinlink_image
tools.description: Generate an image from a prompt.

tools.name: cinlink_video
tools.description: Generate a video from a prompt.

tools.name: cinlink_nlu
tools.description: Route a natural-language media task to a CinLink action.
